name: grill-with-doc
description: Relentlessly interview the engineer about a design decision, challenging terminology and constraints, and capture the outcome in CONTEXT.md, an ADR, or a design doc. Trigger this skill when the user wants to grill/interrogate a design decision or document a new architectural decision.
custom_notes: Ask a clarifying question any time a claim, term, constraint, scope boundary, or required decision is ambiguous or unverified. Prefer the native `request_user_input` tool when available and when the answer can be represented as discrete choices; fall back to a direct conversational question when the tool is unavailable, not exposed in the current mode, or the answer is open-ended. Keep questions focused and ask one decision at a time.
To get the current timestamp, run `Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd-HHmm"` in PowerShell or `date +%Y%m%d-%H%M` in bash.
